mapper.sql: c.id, c.class_name AS className, c.user_id AS userId, c.course_id AS courseId, c.academic_year AS academicYear, c.semester AS semester, c.max_students AS maxStudents, DATE_FORMAT(c.create_time ,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS createTime, co.course_name AS courseName, co.description AS courseDescription
